## Component: EXCEPTION ROW (CP-CAL-02)

One exception, one line: status bar + dot, bold claim, owner and due date right. Stacked into exception lists on one-pagers.

### Geometry (px, follow literally)

```json
{
  "h": 36,
  "bar_w": 4,
  "pad": 14,
  "claim_size": 13,
  "meta_size": 10
}
```

### Color roles

| Element | Role chain |
|---|---|
| row_bg | panel -> background |
| rule | hairline |
| status_critical | negative |
| status_watch | primary |
| status_resolved | positive |
| claim | ink |
| meta | body |

### Rules
- one exception per row; the claim carries a number
- owner and due in caps, right-aligned: every exception is owned
- status colors the bar and dot only, never the whole row

### QA
- [ ] claim has a number
- [ ] owner and due present
- [ ] status semantic
